response.justification: Strong senior generalist with 15+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and data-integration work, plus recent Stripe exposure to MCP code generators and agentic workflow tooling. However, the resume shows only ~1 year of explicit GenAI/agent work and no demonstrated experience with RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or customer-facing forward-deployed delivery — core pillars of this Staff FDE role. Worth a screen to probe depth of AI/cloud work behind the Stripe bullet.
strengths: 15+ years shipping production systems across TypeScript/Node, Python-adjacent stacks, and multiple paradigms
Recent Stripe work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks aligns with key tech
Proven technical leadership: workshops, courses, open-source platforms, and staff-level roles
concerns: No explicit RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation/observability experience listed
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery or forward-deployed consulting delivery
Cloud platform depth unclear — AWS CDK mentioned once; no GCP/Azure or AI-on-cloud architecture detail

key_factors.factor: Missing RAG / vector DB / eval pipeline experience
MCP and agentic workflow work at Stripe
